en: If your company is required to comply with Iraq Statutory Labor Insurance, you will be asked to provide relevant documents in a subsequent form(s).
Iraq Statutory Labor Insurance Applicability Assessment

Under Iraqi Law No. 18 of 2023 on Retirement and Social Security for Workers, all private, mixed, cooperative, and informal-sector employers are legally required to register with the Department of Retirement and Social Security for Workers (Federal – Baghdad) or the Kurdistan Regional Government’s Ministry of Labor and Social Affairs (KRG – MoLSA) and enroll all eligible workers in the applicable regional social security scheme.
Is your company required to comply with Iraq's Retirement and Social Security for Workers requirement and maintain applicable documentation to show compliance?
Article 24 of Law No. 18/2023
Please select from the following reason(s) your company is exempt from complying with Iraq's Retirement and Social Security for Workers requirement.
